policy.combined_reported_time: charge a reported combined duration once; do not split or double-count it
policy.unknown_completed_time: charge the full work-unit budget only when no individual or combined duration exists
policy.schedule_policy: audit-only; elapsed aggregate hours never open, close, defer, or block a technical gate

entries.note: One combined reported duration, charged once. Future G0/G1 repair time is charged separately.

Structural validator + independently cross-checked WILLIAM3 vectors (willow-go 9d848ee raw patch), hifitime pin, panic=unwind, locked five-target probe. One fabricated hex from a summarized fetch was caught by the executable check and replaced with raw-patch values.
Added duplicate-key, non-shortest-integer, and JSON-projection tests; JSON is diagnostic only.
39 public_ tests and clippy were green, but the independent gate review subsequently reopened release-factory containment and bundle completeness.

entries.source: independent adversarial rerun and isolated regression probes
entries.note: Mandatory commands were green. G0 reopened because exact ceilings and resolved drop_format closure are not enforced. G1 reopened because injectable test factories are public in release and bundle precedence, full-result Debug sanitization, exact Entry limits, and hostile boundary coverage are incomplete. Review time is charged from integration contingency.

entries.source: second-review repair sections of the WU0/WU1 reports
entries.note: Exact ceilings + resolved-feature-graph validator; conformance-feature factory containment + zeroize + release_surface test; bundle precedence fix, Debug redaction, 4 KiB entry ceiling, added corpus. 59 tests green. Charged from contingency.
Order-independent join via willow25 prune predicate; 8 tests incl. 24-permutation MemoryStore differential oracle. 0.6h from the 4.0h WU2 reserve.
Arbiter + copy-on-write transaction + receipts + provenance; 13 core tests. G2 CORE only — lifecycle races, tombstone/charge accounting, hostile corpus, per-entry selection outstanding.

entries.source: fresh conformance and locked workspace verification before 3e790ee
entries.note: Aggregate swarm implementation/review time. The initial spec review found tombstone eviction and missing state-preservation coverage; a RED regression and repair passed fresh spec review. Initial quality review found unbounded terminal storage; the repair imposed the session-wide 64-plan cap and removed the inspection vector clone, then fresh quality re-review approved. Full G2 remains blocked by lifecycle races, JoinPlan/conservative charge admission with exact bounds, and hostile corpus/panic quarantine.
